subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! We have heard thy call from the Prison-ward, and have turned towards thee. How numerous were the princes of the earth who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ندایت را شنیدیم از شطر سجن بتو توجه نمودیم چه مقدار از امرای ارض که
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
